title: Dekton Wet & Dry Assorted Sandpaper-10 Assorted Medium, Fine And Extra Fine Sheets| Measuring 230 x 280mm| Suitable For Manual, Mechanical Sanders| Suitable For Working On Rough Walls, Plastics, Wood
features: Assorted medium, fine & extra fine grits
Medium: 80 grit, Fine: 180 grit, Extra Fine: 320 grit.
Suitable for manual and mechanical sanders. Suitable for working on rough walls, resistant plastics and wood
description: The Dekton Wet & Dry Assorted Sandpaper Set is an essential addition to any toolkit, designed to tackle a wide range of sanding tasks with ease and efficiency. This versatile set includes 10 assorted sheets of medium, fine, and extra fine sandpaper, each measuring 230mm x 280mm, offering a comprehensive solution for both manual and mechanical sanding applications. Crafted for both wet and dry use, this sandpaper set is engineered to handle various surfaces and conditions. The medium sheets are perfect for initial sanding and removing rough edges, while the fine and extra fine sheets are ideal for achieving a polished, smooth surface. The assortment of grits ensures that you have the right abrasive for each stage of your project, allowing for a seamless transition from coarse to fine sanding. Each sheet in the Dekton Wet & Dry Assorted Sandpaper Set is designed to deliver consistent and effective results. The high-quality abrasive material ensures durability and long-lasting performance, even when used on demanding surfaces. Whether you're preparing surfaces for painting, smoothing out imperfections, or working on detailed woodcraft projects, this sandpaper set provides the precision and control required to complete the job to a high standard. The large 230mm x 280mm sheets are versatile and can be easily cut to size or shape, making them suitable for a variety of manual and mechanical sanders. This flexibility enhances their usability and ensures compatibility with different sanding tools.
